citation.title: The elastic constants and thermal expansion of single-crystal CdTe
citation.journal: Journal of Physics D: Applied Physics

required_text_markers: The elastic constants and thermal expansion of single-crystal
R D Greenough and S B Palmer

scientific_gate.purpose: Audit the preferred primary single-crystal CdTe thermal-expansion bridge over 4.2-300 K.
scientific_gate.required_follow_up: Digitize or otherwise recover the published thermal-expansion curve and propagate its approximately 3 percent relative alpha uncertainty to the Williams room-temperature lattice anchor before selecting an execution lattice.
